title: Nanocrystalline berberine is associated with improved antitumor activity of PD-1 blockade in ovarian cancer.
publicationName: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
journalName: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
snippet: Ovarian cancer remains a highly lethal gynecologic malignancy with limited responsiveness to immune checkpoint blockade and few well-tolerated strategies for improving antitumor immunity. Here, we developed a nanocrystalline berberine formulation (nanoBBR) using high-pressure homogenization and evaluated whether nanocrystal reformulation is associated with....
